description_long: This is a rustic suspension footbridge spanning a gap between two grassy, soil-topped platforms. The bridge deck is constructed from uneven wooden planks, some of which are slightly misaligned, giving it a hand-built, natural appearance. The bridge is supported by thick rope cables anchored to wooden posts at each end, with additional ropes forming simple handrails for safety. The platforms on either side are rectangular, with visible layers of earth and a top layer of green grass, suggesting a natural or park-like setting. The bridge hangs with a gentle sag in the middle, characteristic of rope suspension bridges. There are no visible lighting fixtures or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian, nature-inspired design.
description: A rustic wooden suspension footbridge with rope handrails, spanning between two grassy, soil-topped platforms. The bridge features uneven planks and a natural, hand-built look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden planked deck, rope handrails, and grassy platforms on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sagging suspension of the bridge and the rope cables supporting the planks.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with a clear look at the bridge's entry and exit points on the grassy platforms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the suspended nature and the uneven wooden planks.
attribute_railing_design: rope handrails supported by vertical wooden posts, simple and functional
